titleStmt.title: SII 38.523: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 523. (A.R. No. 523 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, left of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Kullōttuṅga Chōḷa II Year 8: 1141 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the meykrītti, Pūmaṉṉu padumam etc.,

This inscription records that Saṇḍēsan, (the authority) of the Togumāmaṇiyāṇḍār temple at Tiruvūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, assigned half-a-vēli of land in two pieces to a certain Śrutimān Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyān Jananāthan alias Aṇukkanambi, (a native) of Kuṟichchi to supply one padakku of paddy to meet the daily expenses of worship (tiruppaḍimāṟṟu) to the god, Kshētrapāla-piḷḷaiyār. This assignment was in exchange of some land given to and ten kāśu for making ornaments, deposited with the temple by the above person Śrutimān Aṇukkanambi.
This accountant of the nāḍu Togumāmaṇi Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyān, Kauśikan Periyanambi Vichchādiran, Kauśikan Togumāmaṇi Uyyavandār and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuncey tavattāl paruti va
ḻit tonṟi neṭumālivaneṉa cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Iru nilamakaḷai Urimai
yiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇamulai ceñcāntaṉaintu parumaṇi mā
rvam paṇivarai nikarppac
l puyamiru kayilaipporuppeṉat tonṟa nāmakaḷ tāṉume E
ṅ komakan cevvāy pavaḷacceyoḷi paṭaittaṉa niyāne tava
ḷa nanniṟan tanittuṭaiyoneṉap pukaḻmakaḷ cintai nāḷilum Oru koṭai
nilavum porupaṭait tikiri veyilluṅ karuṅkali t turappana pel
lūḻi Eḻmuka puṟattiluṅ koṭāc ceṅkanik kolini tulavum miṉai veñ
cilaiyuñ citaittu vāṉuyar ponneṭu meruviṟ puviviṟṟiruppa Umpari
yāṉai Oreṭṭinukkun tampamennat tanittani ticaitoṟum vicaiyasta
mpa niṟpa paci pakaiyāti yānatu tiṅku mannuyir taḻaippa manuvāṟu viḷaṅ
tavar tavamum maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Ātiyantaṇarākutik kaṉalumi teḻu koṇ
cu taṇpunalu mekanilRead metinilvaḷarum cātiyoḻukkamum niṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻappāvum
paḻanipRead paḻaṉaparampum paṇaikkai māvumallatu vanṟaṉaip paṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kā
ṇṭaṟ karitena varuntippuṭaiyalum palveṟu puḷḷinamallatu ciṟaiye
nap paṭutalinṟi niṟai peruñcelva moṭavani vāḻp pallavar telu
ṅkar māḷavar kaliṅkar kocalar kannaṭar kiṭāra tennar keraḷar cetiyar tirikantar va
ṅkar raṅkar vattavar mattirar kaṅkar conakar kaikaiyar jinaren ṟaṟai kaḻal ven
tarumallā varaicaru muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟai kuṇarntiṟaiñca Ampon ma
larkkoṭi cempiyankiḻānaṭi Oru maruṅkuṭanamarn tinitiruppa Aruḷpuri cimaiyp po
ṟ ceṭṭimaiyap pāvaiyuñ civanum pola puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m viṟṟiruntaruḷina kovirājakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravartdhikaḷ śrīkolo
ttuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu puvanamuḻutuvaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr
nāṭṭu tiruvūṟṟattūr mahādevar Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇi yāṇṭār śaṇṭicanen
pāttiyoṭu kuṟicciuṭaiya curutimān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān jaṉanātanāṉa A
ṇukkanampi vaṭaceri nattattu kṣē(t)tra( vustāpa) piḷḷaiyārkku nittam patakku nel
tiruppaṭimāṟṟu cella Ittevar tevatām Ukkalūr Ellai nilattuṭan cera I
van viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivan kāṇiyāna vanamāmpāṭiyil kayattuṭaiyān ceyye
nṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpārkkellai kayattuṭai
yān ceykku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Ukkalūrnilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkel
lai jayaṅkoṇṭānceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vanamāmpāṭiyil tevan mu
ttāyan ceykku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamum tiruvāpara
ṇattu ponnukku Oṭukkina kācu pattuṅkoṇṭu Itukkut talaimāṟu kṣettra(ā)pālappiḷ
ḷaiyārkku nittam patakku nel tiruppaṭimāṟṟu celuttaviṭṭa nancey nilamāvatu Ukkalūril munnūṟṟuvan mayakkal nilaṅkālum Itan vaṭakku veḷatti nam pa
kkal Uṭppaṭṭa nilam kālum Āka nilam Arai Innilam Araiyum Aṇukkanampi tanmamāka viṭṭu nilam parivarttaṉaip piramāṇañceytu kuṭutte
n tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān jananātanāna Aṇukkanampikku Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇiyāṇṭār śaṇṭicanen Aruḷāl nāṭṭukkaṇakku kuṟicciuṭaiya
tokumāmaṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaucikan periyanampi viccātiranum kaucikan tukumāmaṇi Uyyavantānum kaucikan Uyyavantān kovum
cirāḷan ciṟiyānum Eḻuttuppaṭiyum nāṭṭukku camaintu jananātan muvāyirattoruvanāta brahmādirāja muttaraiyan Eḻuttuppaṭiyum muvāyirattoruvan jananātan
m tenpāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimān U n Uttamacoḻatevanāna comāci periyaraiyan Eḻuttuppaṭiyum Itu panmāyecuvarar rakṣai § .
Digital edition of SII 38.523 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
